title: Reference connector, tests and operations
goal: Add a reference/mock connector and the operational checks needed before a real pilot source.
acceptance: A mock or reference connector exercises full sync, incremental sync, retries and dead-letter behavior.
Tests cover idempotency, rate-limit retry, malformed payloads, secret redaction and handoff.
Operations guide explains dry-run, run, retry, cleanup and monitoring commands.
Deployment docs describe credential handling and runtime data location.
